chunks.title: Oracle Against Damascus and Ephraim
chunks.reason: Introduces the judgment on Damascus and Ephraim as a distinct prophetic unit.

chunks.title: Judgment on Jacob and Israel's Idolatry
chunks.reason: Describes the waning glory of Jacob and the consequences of their idolatrous practices.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Nations
chunks.reason: Depicts the roaring of nations and their eventual destruction before God.
